source_context:
Conceptual diagram for Section 2.1 "Critical Realism" of a Korean Master's thesis. Stratified ontology of Critical Realism. Show THREE NESTED CONCENTRIC regions (a subset/containment model), NOT three side-by-side boxes.

Outermost and LARGEST region = the Real (Korean label 실재적 층위, English "the real"); content phrase inside the band: 구조 · 생성기제 (structures and generative mechanisms), which exist independently of observation.

Middle region fully inside the Real = the Actual (Korean 현실적 층위, English "the actual"); content phrase: 발생한 사건 (events that occur when mechanisms operate under conditions).

Innermost and SMALLEST region fully inside the Actual = the Empirical (Korean 경험적 층위, English "the empirical"); content phrase: 관측된 사건 (observed events / observations), the subset we actually observe.

Containment relation: 실재적 ⊇ 현실적 ⊇ 경험적. Make outer regions visibly much larger than inner ones so the message "what is observed is only a small subset of reality" reads at a glance.

One generative-direction arrow crossing all three strata from OUTSIDE to INSIDE: 생성기제 → 사건 → 관측 (mechanism generates events, part of which is observed), pointing inward.

Use concentric circles: the Real as a big outer ring, the Actual as a medium ring inside it, the Empirical as a small inner disk. Place each Korean label (with English in parentheses) and its short content phrase clearly within or beside its band; use leader lines so outer-ring labels do not overlap inner content.

Style: flat, minimal, academic publication quality. Calm navy and teal palette, navy outer band shading to lighter teal/blue inner. No 3D, no drop shadows, no decorative clutter, thin clean outlines, white background. Korean text readability is the priority. Do NOT include any abduction terminology.
communicative_intent: 비판적 실재론의 층화된 존재론. 세 층위는 동심 포함관계를 이룬다(실재적 ⊇ 현실적 ⊇ 경험적). 가장 바깥의 실재적 층위(the real)는 구조와 생성기제를, 중간의 현실적 층위(the actual)는 발생한 사건을, 가장 안쪽의 경험적 층위(the empirical)는 관측된 사건을 가리킨다. 바깥에서 안으로 향하는 화살표는 생성기제 → 사건 → 관측의 발생 방향을 나타낸다.
